name: Golden Kamuy -The Hunt of Prisoners in Hokkaido-
original_name: ゴールデンカムイ ―北海道刺青囚人争奪編―
overview: With two map pieces secured, Sugimoto ans Asirpa continue their hunt for the remaining 22 tattooed convicts whose bodies hold the key to hidden treasure.
